title: The Four Step Process to Loop Engineer ANYTHING (+ Why Prompt Engineering Isn't Dead)
summary: Chase AI discusses loop engineering as a trending technique and argues that prompt engineering remains relevant despite declarations of its death. The video breaks down what loop engineering is and provides a four-step process for designing loops.
writeup: Chase AI lays out a four-step methodology for loop engineering with LLMs and makes the case that prompt engineering remains relevant rather than obsolete. The framing positions loop engineering as a complement to prompting, with guidance on when to apply each technique. The takeaway for an agentic-workflows context: structured loops and well-built prompts coexist as distinct tools serving different purposes.
